name: Chicken Rockefeller
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 cups Frozen spinach, drained and squeezed dry
recipeInstructions:
1. Pound each chicken breast with a meat mallet until evenly thin. Set aside.
2. In a large skillet, sauté green onions and garlic in 1 teaspoon butter until the onions are tender.
3. Add drained spinach, dill weed, salt, and pepper to the pan. Cook until the mixture is thoroughly heated.
4. Stir in crumbled feta cheese.
5. Divide the filling into four equal portions and place each portion in the center of a chicken breast.
6. Roll up each stuffed chicken breast carefully.
7. Place the rolls on a greased baking sheet.
8. Brush one side of each filo pastry sheet with melted butter.
9. Arrange the filo sheets into four stacks, each containing four sheets.
10. Place each cooked and stuffed chicken breast in the center of the lower end of one stack.
11. Fold over the sides of the filo dough to enclose the filling completely.
12. Brush the rolls with additional melted butter.
13. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 20 minutes, or until golden brown.
